title: OutputAttribute
description:
OutputAttribute: Attribute providing information about an output parameter of a method.
To be applied to all methods that do not return void nor BH.oM.Base.Output types.

Name.description: Name of the correspondent output parameter (to be used in the UI).

Description.description: Description of the correspondent output parameter.

Classification.description: Classification of the correspondent output parameter, e.g. folder path, quantity etc. ClassificationAttribute: Attribute representing classification of method parameters and object properties, i.e. it tells that a given member is a folder path, quantity etc.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
